news.title:
Intellect Design Arena's Purple Fabric secures a strategic AI deal with a leading Indian financial group.
Shares of Intellect Design Arena traded at Rs. 698.55, with an intraday high of Rs. 702 and low of Rs. 683.
news.summary:

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena and IDCUBE launched Enterprise Security TeamSpace using AI.
It integrates security with operations, turning fragmented data into actionable insights.

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena launches Purple Fabric-enabled tech services with 150+ AI agents.
The initiative aims to streamline service lifecycle management effectively.

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena Ltd announces an analyst/investor meet on Feb 20, 2026.
CFO Vasudha Subramaniam to meet Ambit Asset Management in Chennai, one-on-one.

news.title:
Arab National Bank adopts Intellect’s eMach.AI for digital wholesale banking.
The initiative supports Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 objectives.
news.summary:

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena launches AI platform 'Purple Fabric', priced at ₹99,500/month for up to 50 users.
The platform targets mid-market enterprises, financial firms, governments, and academia for cost-effective AI deployment.
news.summary:

Virtual one-on-one session with Equirus Asset Management at 4 PM IST.

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena chosen by Duca Credit Union for digital banking upgrade.
Duca Credit Union to use Intellect's Emach.AI DEP platform for customized services.
news.summary:

news.title:
Intellect Design's LTM revenue exceeded ₹3,000 Cr; platform revenue rose 128%, license revenue up 37% YoY.
EBITDA increased 33%, cash position grew 49% YoY; focuses on Wholesale, Consumer, AI platforms, Purple Fabric.
news.summary:
Intellect Design's LTM revenue exceeded ₹3,000 Cr; platform revenue rose 128%, license revenue up 37% YoY.
EBITDA increased 33%, cash position grew 49% YoY; focuses on Wholesale, Consumer, AI platforms, Purple Fabric.

news.title:
Intellect Design earns ISO IEC 42001:2023, the first AI management standard.
It now holds five global FinTech certifications, enhancing trust in AI deployment.
news.summary:
Intellect Design earns ISO IEC 42001:2023, the first AI management standard.

news.title: Intellect Design expects its margins to remain stable, according to CNBC TV18.
news.summary: Intellect Design expects its margins to remain stable, according to CNBC TV18.

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena partners with Sampath Bank to innovate corporate and SME banking in Sri Lanka.
The collaboration focuses on cash management, trade finance, and supply chain finance via Emach.AI.
news.summary:

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena's Dec 2025 standalone net sales fell 1.4% Y-o-Y to Rs 381.3 crore.
Quarterly net loss reduced 121.1% Y-o-Y to Rs 7.2 crore; shares gained 17.8% in 6 months.
news.summary:
Intellect Design Arena's Dec 2025 standalone net sales fell 1.4% Y-o-Y to Rs 381.3 crore.
Quarterly net loss reduced 121.1% Y-o-Y to Rs 7.2 crore; shares gained 17.8% in 6 months.

news.title:
Intellect Design Arena's 3-year TSR rose 99%, surpassing its 96% share price gain.
EPS grew by 8.5% annually over 3 years, with share price up 25% annually, signaling optimism.
news.summary:
Intellect Design Arena's 3-year TSR rose 99%, surpassing its 96% share price gain.
EPS grew by 8.5% annually over 3 years, with share price up 25% annually, signaling optimism.

news.title:
